title: Surgeon Vacancy at SRL Diagnostics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at SRL Diagnostics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? SRL Diagnostics in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SRL Diagnostics:
SRL Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRL Diagnostics!
